name: Brik Transportation Acad LLC
recent_news: No public news, articles, or website found; LLC with ~29 employees in Minden, LA likely serving Webster Parish but unconfirmed.
fit_notes: Sub-scale LA single-location operator; data sparse; would require direct outreach to confirm contracts, ownership and whether it is an active school-bus contractor vs a CDL training academy (name suggests possible driver-training academy).

name: Linder Bus Co
recent_news: Owner Rick Linder retired and liquidated the company in 2013 after 62 years serving ISD 423; contract transitioned to Hutchinson Bus Line for 2013-14 school year. Company is defunct.
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in target - business was liquidated in 2013 when Rick Linder retired; contract moved to Hutchinson Bus Line. Stale record in source dataset.

name: Basma School Transport Inc
recent_news: No recent M&A or news; listed in NJ DOE school bus contractor code directory; principal address shown variously as Bloomfield, NJ (PO Box) and 161 N Arlington Ave, East Orange, NJ.
fit_notes: Sub-scale Essex County NJ family operator under Magdi Osman; appears on NJ DOE contractor lists. Could be a small tuck-in for Summit's NJ footprint but limited fleet/revenue (~$1.2M) and no successor signal identified yet; needs direct outreach.

name: Cozy Bus Co
recent_news: Formal name Braga Transportation Cozy Bus Co., Inc.; operates Mattapoisett and Fall River divisions; 2015 state inspection flagged 12 of 28 buses (mostly minor flat tire/exhaust issues, all remedied before school year start).
fit_notes: Family-owned Braga operator (~28 buses) holds Old Rochester Regional / Tri-Town contracts plus Fall River division - a credible small MA tuck-in fit for Summit's New England footprint; need to confirm owner age / succession intent.

name: A & R Bus Svc LLC
recent_news: No public news, website, or owner identification found; QACPS uses multiple LLC contractors per published 2019-2022 bus contracts but A&R is not directly named in public sources retrieved.
fit_notes: Small Eastern Shore MD LLC (~28 employees) likely a QACPS contractor; data sparse and ownership unknown - direct outreach required to assess. Geography fits Summit's MD/DE corridor expansion if confirmed independent.
